title: Sustainability and molecular biology: An interview with Prof. Niels Mailand and Ann Schirin Mirsanaye.
abstract: Prof. Niels Mailand and Ann Schirin Mirsanaye share with Molecular Cell some of their thoughts on making molecular biology more sustainable, outline their first-hand experiences of having their lab LEAF (Laboratory Efficiency Assessment Framework) certified, and impart some advice to our readers who are considering doing the same.
